title: Senior Software Engineer
description: We're looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our growing platform team. You'll work on high-impact features that serve millions of users, collaborating closely with product and design to ship reliable, scalable software.
responsibilities: Design, build, and maintain scalable backend services using Node.js and TypeScript
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
Conduct thorough code reviews and uphold engineering best practices
Mentor junior engineers and contribute to a healthy team culture
Participate in on-call rotations and incident response
requirements: 5+ years of professional software engineering experience
Strong proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, or similar backend stack
Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL)
Solid understanding of REST API design and microservices architecture
Comfortable working in an agile, fast-paced environment
nice_to_have: Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration
Familiarity with AWS or GCP cloud infrastructure

title: Product Manager
description: We're seeking a driven Product Manager to own the roadmap for our core consumer product. You'll partner with engineering, design, and data teams to identify opportunities, define requirements, and deliver features that delight our users.
responsibilities: Define and prioritize the product roadmap in alignment with company goals
Write clear product requirements and user stories for engineering teams
Analyze user research, data, and market trends to inform product decisions
Facilitate sprint planning, standups, and retrospectives
Communicate product vision and progress to stakeholders
requirements: 3+ years of product management experience in a tech company
Proven ability to ship products end-to-end in a cross-functional environment
Strong analytical skills with experience using tools like Amplitude or Mixpanel
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Customer-first mindset with a passion for solving real user problems
nice_to_have: Experience in B2C SaaS or consumer mobile apps
Technical background or ability to read basic code

title: Data Scientist
description: Join our Data & Analytics team to help us turn raw data into actionable insights. You'll build models that power personalization, forecasting, and business intelligence across the company.
responsibilities: Develop and deploy machine learning models for recommendation and prediction systems
Collaborate with product and engineering to integrate models into production pipelines
Design and analyze A/B experiments to evaluate feature impact
Build dashboards and reports to communicate findings to non-technical stakeholders
Maintain and improve data quality standards across key datasets
requirements: 3+ years of experience in a data science or ML engineering role
Proficiency in Python (pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow)
Strong SQL skills and experience with large-scale data warehouses (e.g. BigQuery, Snowflake)
Solid grounding in statistics and experimental design
Experience taking models from prototype to production
nice_to_have: Experience with NLP or LLM-based applications
Familiarity with dbt or similar data transformation tools
Published research or Kaggle competition experience

title: UX Designer
description: We're looking for a UX Designer who obsesses over craft and empathy. You'll lead end-to-end design for key product areas, shaping experiences that are intuitive, accessible, and visually refined.
responsibilities: Lead UX research including user interviews, usability tests, and surveys
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs in Figma
Partner with product managers to align design work with business goals
Champion accessibility and inclusive design principles across the product
Contribute to and maintain the company's design system
requirements: 4+ years of UX/product design experience
Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process
Expert-level proficiency in Figma
Experience conducting user research and translating insights into design decisions
Excellent communication and collaboration skills
nice_to_have: Experience designing for mobile-first or native iOS/Android apps

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We're hiring a Senior DevOps Engineer to own and evolve our cloud infrastructure. You'll ensure our platform is secure, reliable, and able to scale with our rapid growth.
responsibilities: Design and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform and CloudFormation
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support fast, reliable deployments
Monitor system health, respond to incidents, and drive post-mortems
Implement security best practices and manage access controls
Collaborate with engineering teams to optimize performance and reduce costs
requirements: 5+ years of DevOps or infrastructure engineering experience
Deep hands-on experience with AWS (EC2, RDS, EKS, S3, IAM)
Proficiency with infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform preferred)
Experience with Docker and Kubernetes in production
Strong scripting skills in Bash or Python
nice_to_have: Experience with service mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd)
